---
title: "Selected Projects"
description: "I build tools and turn ideas into reality. Here's a selection of projects I've created over the years."
page-layout: full
toc: false
listing:
  id: all-projects
  contents: "*/index.qmd"
  sort: "date desc"
  template: ../_ejs/project-card.ejs
include-after-body:
  - text: |
      <script src="../assets/home.js"></script>
---

<div class="nw-filters" data-nw-filter-for="all-projects"></div>

::: {#all-projects .nw-projects}
:::
